overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART elevated transit system in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The journey travels through neon-lit skyscrapers, passes a station platform, and overlooks busy streets with large holographic advertisements and iconic red neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit walkway approaching open air

events.description: exits enclosed transit structure into open elevated track with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: ascending on the NCART elevated transit system, moving from enclosed station to open track

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying 'MINDFUCK' with stylized character in purple and white
enclosed elevated walkway with metal railings and concrete walls
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with various colored neon signs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside an enclosed elevated transit walkway, dominated by a large vertical digital billboard on the left. As the transit vehicle ascends and moves forward, it emerges from the concrete structure into an open-air section, revealing the sprawling neon-lit skyline of Night City in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit track overlooking downtown Night City

agents.ego_description: traveling at steady speed along elevated rail with panoramic view of neon cityscape and streets below

entered.detail: illuminated blue 'NCART' signage mounted on distant skyscraper facade
tall building with horizontal illuminated windows and reflective glass surface
multi-lane road with vehicle traffic visible below the elevated track

segments.scene_description: Traveling along the open elevated track, the camera captures a sweeping view of Night City's downtown district. The NCART sign glows on a distant building to the left while glass office towers rise on the right. Below, sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane streets, and the concrete structure of the previous segment falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor between high-rise buildings approaching station

events.description: transit vehicle slows down and comes to a stop at NCART station platform

agents.ego_description: decelerating while passing through narrow corridor between buildings, arriving at station platform

entered.detail: transit station with teal 'NCART' neon signage, ticket machines, and platform barriers
large horizontal screen displaying red advertisement with white corporate logo

segments.scene_description: The transit vehicle enters a narrow corridor between towering buildings, temporarily obscuring the open sky. It slows down and arrives at an NCART station platform, identifiable by its distinctive teal neon signage and ticket vending machines. A red digital billboard glows in the distance as the vehicle comes to a stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with large holographic advertisements

events.description: transit vehicle accelerates departing NCART station into commercial district
passing massive red neon lips signage that dominates the building facade

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated track through dense neon advertising district, overlooking moderate street traffic below

notable_agents.action: cars moving along multi-lane street with red traffic lights visible below the track

entered.detail: giant digital billboard displaying '16 FLAVORS YOU'D LOVE TO MIX' with product imagery
massive illuminated red neon sign shaped like lips mounted on building facade
tall vertical purple neon light strip running down building edge
red traffic signals and vehicle headlights visible on street intersection below

segments.scene_description: Departing the station, the vehicle accelerates through a dense commercial district saturated with neon advertising. A massive vertical billboard on the right promotes '16 FLAVORS' while the iconic red neon lips sign illuminates the left side of the track. Below, moderate traffic flows through the streets, with red traffic lights visible at the intersection as the journey continues through the vibrant Night Cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from an enclosed transit walkway into the sprawling, neon-saturated heart of Night City. It begins within a concrete structure dominated by a vertical digital billboard before emerging into an open-air section that reveals a sweeping vista of glass office towers and a distant glowing NCART sign. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters a narrow corridor between skyscrapers, slowing down to arrive at a station platform marked by teal neon signage and ticket machines. Finally, the vehicle accelerates away from the station and plunges into a dense commercial district, passing a massive 16 FLAVORS billboard and iconic red neon lips as the view opens up to the vibrant traffic and lights of the cityscape below.
